title: CFOs must stop mistaking finance AI deployment for value creation
description: Finance functions are rapidly moving AI from experimentation into production, but many CFOs are still struggling to convert AI deployment into significant business value, according to Gartner. Marco Steecker, director analyst, research in the Gartner Finance practice, says finance’s 2026 AI “report card” shows that AI adoption is advancing, but realised value is not keeping [...] The post CFOs must stop mistaking finance AI deployment for value creation appeared first on IT-Online .

title: AIONOS And Black Box Join Hands For AI Growth
description: BTTV’s Aastha Chopra spoke to CP Gurnani, Co Founder and Vice Chairman of AIONOS, and Sanjeev Verma, Whole Time Director of Black Box, on their newly announced strategic alliance. The two companies said the partnership aims to combine digital infrastructure with AI solutions to help businesses adopt new technologies faster. They highlighted the growing demand for AI and data centres across the world and said India is at the beginning of a major growth cycle. The leaders expressed confidence that India can emerge as a global hub for data, talent and digital innovation. They also said the partnership will focus on delivering stronger solutions to customers while tapping opportunities across sectors over the next few years.

title: Revefi Launches AI DBA to Manage, Optimize, and Operate Cloud Data Platforms
description: A F500 Enterprise used the Revefi AI DBA to autonomously manage more than 700 Snowflake warehouses, reducing spend by 50% in less than 48 hours. Revefi today announced the launch of the Revefi AI DBA, an agentic teammate that works alongside data teams to manage, optimize, and operate their cloud data platform. title: Acemoglu: Pope Leo could’ve gone further in his encyclical on AI—this technology demands deep thought
description: The pope raised the question of what AI's purpose ought to be. This is a good starting point for questions like what choices humanity must make in response to the technology. Here are some policy options.
